data.current_description: Fetch historical bars for multiple symbols.
data.description_suggestion: Fetch historical OHLCV bar data for multiple symbols in a single request. Accepts a list of symbols and returns Bar objects for each symbol. More efficient than individual requests for retrieving candlestick data across multiple securities.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about return format (Bar objects) and domain context (OHLCV). Enhanced version clarifies the batch nature of the operation and its efficiency advantage for AI agents deciding between batch vs. individual requests.

message: Operation 'placeOrder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Improved version specifies supported instruments, clarifies the action (buy/sell), describes the request schema structure, explains the response, indicates side effects (order sent to market), and notes authentication requirement for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Submit a new order for stocks, options, or other instruments.
data.description_suggestion: Submits a new order to buy or sell stocks, options, futures, or crypto on the Webull platform. Accepts a PlaceOrderRequest containing symbol, quantity, price, order type, and time-in-force parameters. Returns an OrderResponse with the order ID and confirmation status. The order is immediately sent to the market and may be partially or fully filled. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Improved version specifies supported instruments, clarifies the action (buy/sell), describes the request schema structure, explains the response, indicates side effects (order sent to market), and notes authentication requirement for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'cancelOrder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks essential details about inputs, outputs, and constraints. Improved version specifies the required parameter (order ID), explains the constraint (only pending orders), describes the response, clarifies the side effect (order removed from market), and notes authentication requirement.

data.description_suggestion: Cancels a pending order by order ID. Requires the order ID as a parameter. Only orders with pending status can be cancelled; filled or partially filled orders cannot be cancelled. Returns confirmation of cancellation. The order will be removed from the market immediately upon successful cancellation. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks essential details about inputs, outputs, and constraints. Improved version specifies the required parameter (order ID), explains the constraint (only pending orders), describes the response, clarifies the side effect (order removed from market), and notes authentication requirement.

message: Operation 'replaceOrder' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary and description are nearly identical and lack clarity. Improved summary uses clearer action verb. Improved description specifies what can be modified, describes the request schema, explains the response, clarifies the side effect (original cancelled, new order placed), notes the constraint (pending orders only), and indicates authentication requirement.

data.description_suggestion: Modifies an existing pending order with new parameters such as quantity, price, or time-in-force. Accepts a ReplaceOrderRequest containing the order ID and updated order parameters. Returns an OrderResponse with the new order ID and confirmation status. The original order is cancelled and a new order is placed with the updated parameters. Only pending orders can be replaced. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are nearly identical and lack clarity. Improved summary uses clearer action verb. Improved description specifies what can be modified, describes the request schema, explains the response, clarifies the side effect (original cancelled, new order placed), notes the constraint (pending orders only), and indicates authentication requirement.
